'''''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi''''' is a reprint trade paperback collection, collecting all four issues of the [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (1983)|''Star Wars: Return of the Jedi'' (1983)]] series.

==Contents==
*[[Return of the Jedi 1|''Return of the Jedi'' 1]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 2|''Return of the Jedi'' 2]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 3|''Return of the Jedi'' 3]]
*[[Return of the Jedi 4|''Return of the Jedi'' 4]]
